description: You are a museum registrar at the Hartwell Center for American Art. Create a formal exhibition catalog for 'Light in Motion: Masterworks of French Impressionism' using the data provided in /home/ga/Documents/exhibition_data.json. The final document must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/Light_in_Motion_Catalog.odt and include a title page, the Curator's Foreword, an Exhibition Overview, catalog entries for all 8 artworks, a Loan Acknowledgments section, and an Inventory Checklist table. Use Heading 1 styles for main sections and Heading 2 styles for individual artwork titles. The catalog requires an auto-generated Table of Contents at the beginning and page numbers in the footer.
